description_long: This is a classic portable radio receiver with a rectangular body, featuring a prominent telescopic antenna extending vertically from the top. The front face displays a large circular speaker grille on the left, a frequency tuning scale with a clear window, and several control knobs and buttons for tuning and volume adjustment. The casing appears to be made of a combination of dark plastic and faux wood paneling, giving it a retro aesthetic. A sturdy handle is integrated into the top for easy carrying, and the back side includes a battery compartment and additional ports. The left and right sides are relatively plain, with some ribbed texture and possibly a power or headphone jack. A colorful sticker or logo is visible on the front, adding a touch of character to the device.
description: A retro portable radio receiver with a telescopic antenna, large speaker grille, tuning scale, and faux wood paneling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, tuning scale, control knobs, and a colorful sticker or logo.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the ribbed texture, handle, and the extended antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, ports, and the back of the handle.
description_view_3: Right side view with ribbed texture and the antenna visible, but minimal additional features.
